nasb.text: In the year that the commander came to Ashdod, when Sargon the king of Assyria sent him and he fought against Ashdod and captured it,

esv.text: In the year that the commander in chief, who was sent by Sargon the king of Assyria, came to Ashdod and fought against it and captured it—

cnv.text: 亞述王撒珥根差派統帥去亞實突的那年，那統帥就攻打亞實突，把城佔領。

ccb.text: 亚述王撒珥根派元帅攻陷非利士的亚实突城那年，

csbs.text: 亚述王撒珥根派遣元帅到阿实图的那年，元帅攻打阿实图，把城攻取了。
